channel.name: OpenEyes Query - CTMUHB

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: Set hosnum or nhsnum parameter
Bind namespaces

com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.name: Create SOAP Request using XSLT
com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.template:
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:mpi="http://apps.wales.nhs.uk/mpi/" xmlns:urn="urn:hl7-org:v2xml"> <xsl:output omit-xml-declaration="yes" indent="yes"/>
<xsl:template match="node()|@*"> <xsl:copy> <xsl:apply-templates select="node()|@*"/> </xsl:copy> </xsl:template>
<xsl:template match="/"> <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:mpi="http://apps.wales.nhs.uk/mpi/" xmlns:urn="urn:hl7-org:v2xml"> <soapenv:Header/> <soapenv:Body> <mpi:InvokePatientDemographicsQuery> <xsl:apply-templates select="*"/> </mpi:InvokePatientDemographicsQuery> </soapenv:Body> </soapenv:Envelope> </xsl:template>
<xsl:template match="*[name() = 'UNKNOWN.1']"> <xsl:element name="urn:QIP.1"><xsl:value-of select="."/></xsl:element> </xsl:template> <xsl:template match="*[name() = 'UNKNOWN.2']"> <xsl:element name="urn:QIP.2"><xsl:value-of select="."/></xsl:element> </xsl:template>
<xsl:template match="*"> <xsl:element name="urn:{name()}" namespace="urn:hl7-org:v2xml"> <xsl:copy-of select="namespace::*"/> <xsl:apply-templates select="node()|@*"/> </xsl:element> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>

com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.name: Extract SOAP body
com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.template:
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:mpi="http://apps.wales.nhs.uk/mpi/" exclude-result-prefixes="soapenv">
<xsl:strip-space elements="*"/> <xsl:output method="xml" version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" indent="yes"/>
<!-- remove all elements in the soapenv namespace --> <xsl:template match="soapenv:*"> <xsl:apply-templates select="node()"/> </xsl:template>
<!-- remove all elements in the mpi namespace (should only be the SOAP action name at this stage) --> <xsl:template match="mpi:*"> <xsl:apply-templates select="node()"/> </xsl:template>
<!-- remove all attributes --> <xsl:template match="@*"> <xsl:apply-templates select="node()"/> </xsl:template>
<!-- for the remaining elements (i.e. elements in the default namespace) ... --> <xsl:template match="*"> <!-- ... create a new element with similar name in no-namespace --> <xsl:element name="{local-name()}"> <xsl:apply-templates select="@*|node()"/> </xsl:element> </xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.name: Transform to OpenEyes XML
com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.template:
GB HOME CORR
Y <xsl:value-of select="translate(PID.5.5/text(), $vLower, $vUpper)"/>

channel.preprocessingScript: // Modify the message variable below to pre process data return message;
